sections.model_description: A model designed to automatically approve or reject loan applications. The system makes final autonomous decisions without human intervention to speed up the process.
sections.intended_use: Credit scoring and loan approval in retail banking.
sections.limitations: May struggle with applicants who have short credit histories.
sections.bias_analysis: Tested across gender and age groups, demographic parity difference is less than 2%.
sections.ethical_considerations: The model decisions impact financial access, so fairness is monitored quarterly.
sections.environmental_impact: Minimal, trained on a small CPU cluster.
